question: What is the relation between the man holding a video camera and the soccer game? Select from the following options: (A) He is a spectator in the audience. (B) He is recording the soccer match. (C) He is a player of the soccer team. (D) He is a coach of one of the soccer teams.
gold_answer: He is recording the soccer match
answer_choices: He is a spectator in the audience
He is recording the soccer match
He is a player of the soccer team
He is a coach of one of the soccer teams
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
